0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Long-Running Tasks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Maintain context across sessions for projects that span hours, days, or weeks."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Challenge"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent sessions restart on:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Deployment updates"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Infrastructure failures"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Scheduled maintenance"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Scale-down events"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Without persistent memory, context is lost."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Solution"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"flowchart LR\nS1[Session 1\nDay 1] -->|remember| DB[(Mnemosyne)]\nS2[Session 2\nDay 3] -->|recall| DB\nS3[Session 3\nDay 7] -->|recall| DB"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"style DB fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Session Persistence"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"db_path"}]," to persist memory across restarts:"]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Connect to a persistent database with a named session\nmem = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"website-redesign\",\n  db_path=\"/data/memories.db\",\n)\n\n# Store progress\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Completed hero section design. User approved color palette.\",\n  source=\"conversation\",\n  importance=0.7,\n)\n\n# Store task state\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Next step: implement responsive navigation component.\",\n  source=\"task-tracker\",\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Resuming Across Restarts"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["When your agent restarts, reconnect with the same ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"db_path"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# New process — reconnect to the same session\nmem = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"website-redesign\",\n  db_path=\"/data/memories.db\",\n)\n\n# Recover context\ncontext = mem.recall(\"design progress and next steps\", top_k=10)\nfor item in context:\n  print(item)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Using Scope for Long-Running Tasks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scope"}]," parameter helps separate temporary vs. permanent memories:"]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"website-redesign\", db_path=\"/data/memories.db\")\n\n# Temporary task context (session-scoped)\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Current CSS file is main.scss in /src/styles.\",\n  scope=\"session\",\n  importance=0.4,\n)\n\n# Permanent project knowledge (global)\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Website uses the company design system v3.\",\n  scope=\"global\",\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Backup & Recovery"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Use the disaster recovery module to protect long-running work:"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.dr.recovery import create_backup, restore_backup\n\n# Create backup before risky operations\ncreate_backup(db_path=\"/data/memories.db\", backup_path=\"/backups/pre-deploy.bak\")\n\n# Restore if needed\nrestore_backup(backup_path=\"/backups/pre-deploy.bak\", db_path=\"/data/memories.db\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Deployment Considerations"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Concern"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Solution"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Database persistence"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Persistent volume for ",["$","code",null,{"children":"db_path"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Backup before deploy"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Pre-deploy backup via 5:["$","code",null,{"children":"create_backup()"}]

8:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Example: Weekly Report Agent"}]
9:["$","$L4",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Runs every Monday at 9 AM\ndef generate_weekly_report():\n  mem = Mnemosyne(\n      session_id=\"weekly-reports\",\n      db_path=\"/data/reports.db\",\n  )\n  \n  # Recall recent activities\n  last_week = mem.recall(\"project updates decisions\", top_k=10)\n  \n  # Generate report\n  report = compile_report(last_week)\n  \n  # Store report for future reference\n  mem.remember(\n      content=report.summary,\n      source=\"weekly-report\",\n      importance=0.7,\n  )\n  \n  return report\n","language":"python"}]
